files.patch:
@@ -14,11 +14,14 @@ jobs:
       - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v3
         with:
           version: 10.20.0
+          run_install: false
       - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
           node-version: 22
           cache: 'pnpm'
+          cache-dependency-path: pnpm-lock.yaml
       - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
+      - run: pnpm --version
       - run: pnpm check
       - run: pnpm build
       - run: pnpm test
